---
name: Widget request
about: Request (or propose) a new service widget
title: 'Widget: <service name>'
labels: widget, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Service**
<!-- Name of the service this widget would integrate (e.g. Plex, Portainer, Pi-hole). -->

**API documentation**
<!-- Link to the service's REST API docs, and how it authenticates
     (API key header, basic auth, token query param, …). -->

**What stats should it show?**
<!-- The handful of numbers/values worth a tile, e.g. "active streams,
     library item count". Keep it to what fits a compact StatTile. -->

**Are you able to contribute it?**
<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md → "How to add a service widget". Happy to guide. -->
